hero.subheadline: I build digital products from frontend to cloud — with clean architecture, real performance impact, and a focus on what users actually need.

visual.wireframeAlt: Wireframe transforming into a finished interface
visual.label: Blueprint → Product

featuredProjects.label: Featured Projects
featuredProjects.heading: Featured Projects
featuredProjects.description: Case studies where I combined design, architecture, and product thinking.

agrotech.title: AgroTech 2.0
agrotech.hook: Bogotá's 2024 drought made water rationing a daily reality. Built with my university team, AgroTech automates irrigation using Arduino sensors and lays the groundwork for a full crop analytics platform where technology finally serves Colombian agriculture, not the other way around.

transmilenio-router.title: Transmilenio Router
transmilenio-router.hook: Bogotá commuters lose hours every week to suboptimal routes. Existing apps are slow, incomplete, and force you through a clunky origin/destination UI. Transmilenio Router models the entire 141-station BRT network as a graph and lets you query it in plain language, because finding your route should not be the hard part of your commute.

portfolio.title: This Portfolio
portfolio.hook: Most portfolios are just résumés with a coat of paint. This one is built to grow into something more: a blog where I write about computer science fundamentals and software engineering thinking, and a personal brand that communicates how I approach building, not just what I have built.

process.label: My Process
process.heading: My Process — Blueprint to Product
process.description: A structured approach that balances architectural rigor with creative problem-solving.

blueprint.label: Step 1
blueprint.title: Blueprint
blueprint.description: Requirements analysis, system design, architecture diagrams. Understanding the problem before writing a single line of code.

prototype.label: Step 2
prototype.title: Prototype
prototype.description: Wireframes, rapid iteration, and testing. Validating ideas early with real feedback before committing to full implementation.

ship.label: Step 3
ship.title: Ship
ship.description: Production-grade architecture, infrastructure setup, deployment pipelines. Building for scale, performance, and reliability.

contactCta.title: Let's build something
contactCta.subtitle: Whether you're looking for a full-stack engineer, want to talk architecture, or just want to connect — I'd love to hear from you.
